case_title: TERRY BAGBY VS. DREAMS DUVETS AND BED LINENS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DREAMS DUVETS AND BED LINENS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DREAMS DUVETS AND BED LINENS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAGBY, TERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DREAMS DUVETS AND BED LINENS, INC. $690.06 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $690.06, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN APRIL 27, 2012, TURN OVER TO PLAINTIFF THE FITTED BED COVER HE ORDERED FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $690.06 FILED BY BAGBY, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT DREAMS DUVETS AND BED LINENS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
